title: Size Select: Dropdown
pitch: On PDPs with many size options, the default swatch grid sprawls vertically and pushes the add-to-cart button further from the product information. This variant collapses all sizes into a single dropdown button that expands into a scrollable panel on tap. Out-of-stock sizes are clearly marked, selection updates the button label, and the entire interaction stays compact.
problem: The default size swatch grid consumed excessive vertical space on PDPs, especially for products with many sizes. This pushed the add-to-cart button further from the product details, creating friction in the purchase flow.
hypothesis: Collapsing sizes into a dropdown would reclaim vertical real estate and bring the CTA closer to where the customer is making decisions, improving conversion.
